questions.question: As per the recent analysis by NASA, 2022 is tied with 2015 as the _____ warmest on record?
questions.explanation: According to an analysis by (NASA), the Earth’s average surface temperature in 2022 tied with 2015 as the fifth warmest on record. Scientists from NASA’s Goddard Institute for Space Studies (GISS) say that global temperatures in 2022 were 1.6 degrees Fahrenheit, or 0.89 degrees Celsius, above the average for NASA’s baseline period 1951-1980.

questions.question: Thiruvalluvar is a famous poet of which language?
questions.explanation: Thiruvalluvar is a celebrated Tamil poet and philosopher, best known as the author of the Tirukkuraḷ, a collection of couplets on ethics, political and economics, and love. Thiruvalluvar Day is celebrated in Tamil Nadu as a part of Pongal celebrations. On the occasion of Thiruvalluvar Day, chief minister MK Stalin launched the ‘Vallalar Palluyir Kappagangal’, a Rs 20 crore scheme announced for animal welfare.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry runs the MAARG (Mentorship, Advisory, Assistance, Resilience, and Growth) Platform?

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports

questions.explanation: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), Ministry of Commerce and Industry with the support of Zone Startups India held the MAARG Mentor Masterclass. MAARG (Mentorship, Advisory, Assistance, Resilience, and Growth), the National Mentorship Platform is a one stop platform to facilitate mentorship for Start-Ups across the country.

questions.question: Yuki Bhambri and Saketh Myneni, who were seen in the news, play which sports?
questions.explanation: The top-seeded Indian Tennis team of Yuki Bhambri and Saketh Myneni has won the Bangkok Open title. This is their sixth title together on the ATP Challenger Tour, as the Indians beat the Indonesian-Australian combo 2-6 7-6(7) 14-12. Yuki and Sakethwill next compete in the Australian Open — the season’s first Grand Slam.

questions.question: Which institution released the report titled ‘State Finances: A Study of Budgets’?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India recently released a report titled ‘State Finances: A Study of Budgets’. As pr the study, the fiscal health of States has improved from a sharp pandemic-induced deterioration in 2020-21. The improvement is due to the back of a broad-based economic recovery and high revenue collections with their gross fiscal deficit (GFD) budgeted to decline from 4.1% of gross domestic product (GDP) in 2020-21 to 3.4% in 2022-23.

questions.question: A Yeti Airlines with 72 passengers crashed in which country, in its deadliest plane crash in 30 years?
questions.explanation: Nepal faces its deadliest plane crash in 30 years as the Yeti Airlines flight from Kathmandu to the tourist town of Pokhara crashed. There were 72 passengers and crew aboard the Yeti Airlines and all passengers were dead after the crash. The Himalayan country has some of the most difficult terrain to navigate. The European Union has banned Nepalese airlines from its airspace over concerns about training and maintenance standards.

questions.question: Scientists have reported first evidence of the presence of solitary waves or distinct electric field fluctuations in which planet?
questions.explanation: Scientists from the Indian Institute of Geomagnetism (IIG), have reported the first evidence of the presence of solitary waves or distinct electric field fluctuations in the Martian magnetosphere. The study of these waves is crucial as they directly control particle energization, plasma loss, transport, etc., through wave-particle interactions. Despite several missions to Mars, the presence of solitary waves in the Martian magnetosphere has never been reported earlier.

questions.question: Scientists used which entity to change the direction of lightning strikes for the first time?
questions.explanation: Scientists used a high-powered laser to change the direction of lightning strikes for the first time. The laser was aimed at the sky on the top of Mount Santis in north-eastern Switzerland. The new device, called Laser Lightning Rod (LLR), could increase protection by extending the height of rods hundreds of meters. With more development, LLR could improve protection for important places such as power stations and airports.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry awards the ‘National Startup Awards 2022’?
questions.explanation: Union Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal felicitates National Startup Awards 2022 winners. Startup India Innovation week culminated with the felicitation of National Start-up Awards 2022 winners on National Start-up Day. At the event, 41 startups, two incubators, and one accelerator were recognised as winners.

questions.question: India is set to start supplying diesel to which country through a Friendship pipeline?
questions.explanation: The India-Bangladesh Friendship pipeline (IBFPL) will start supplying diesel to Bangladesh on an experimental basis for June this year. About 131.5 kilometre long pipeline has been constructed for importing diesel from India. Out of this, 126.5 kilometre pipeline is in Bangladesh and 5 kilometre line is in India. The international pipeline will carry diesel from the Siliguri based marketing terminal of the Numaligarh Refinery Limited to Parbatipur depot of Bangladesh Petroleum Corporation (BPC).
